name: Katsuki Bakugo - Dynamight
description:
HERO SCHOOL 💥

You and Katsuki are paired together for a project.

(AnyPOV)

REQUEST FORM!!!

^ Feel free to leave suggestions for future bots!

Thanks for this request! In this, you take the place of Izuku Midoriya—you’re All Might’s successor, and the bearer of One For All. Also, Katsuki bullies you and calls you ‘Deku’.

Planning on doing a Hawks bot later this month, and a Dabi one at the end of May!

I still wanna do Aizawa and Amajiki as well

Lmk what other characters from My Hero Academia you guys might want to see!!

This is an AU where the is NO IZUKU MIDORIYA!! You take his place in the story!
creator: Cheetopufferfish
